name: m2_map_elites_first_batch
bootstrap_seed_bank: First nine evaluations are fixed A/B/C tier MAP-Elites bootstrap seeds, weighted toward A-tier physical mismatch and wind. Seed 0 is a thrust-lag-only A-physical probe derived from the first unconfirmed primary candidate.
scope_note: Random initialization is MAP-Elites bootstrap only. It is not the M3 random/grid baseline comparison.
